import os
import time
import threading
import queue
import requests

# Video Metadata
class VideoMetadata:
    def __init__(self, video_id, title, duration, resolution, file_size):
        self.video_id = video_id
        self.title = title
        self.duration = duration
        self.resolution = resolution
        self.file_size = file_size

# Video Streaming Service
class VideoStreamingService:
    def __init__(self, video_dir):
        self.video_dir = video_dir
        self.video_metadata = {}
        self.session_queue = queue.Queue()
        self.session_threads = []

    def add_video(self, video_id, title, duration, resolution, file_size):
        video_metadata = VideoMetadata(video_id, title, duration, resolution, file_size)
        self.video_metadata[video_id] = video_metadata

    def start_streaming(self, video_id, user_id, start_time=0, resolution='720p'):
        self.session_queue.put((video_id, user_id, start_time, resolution))
        self.start_session_thread()

    def start_session_thread(self):
        if len(self.session_threads) < 10:
            thread = threading.Thread(target=self.handle_session)
            thread.start()
            self.session_threads.append(thread)

    def handle_session(self):
        while True:
            video_id, user_id, start_time, resolution = self.session_queue.get()
            self.stream_video(video_id, user_id, start_time, resolution)
            self.session_queue.task_done()

    def stream_video(self, video_id, user_id, start_time, resolution):
        video_metadata = self.video_metadata[video_id]
        video_file = os.path.join(self.video_dir, f"{video_id}_{resolution}.mp4")

        # Handle variable connection quality
        try:
            with open(video_file, 'rb') as f:
                f.seek(int(start_time * video_metadata.file_size / video_metadata.duration))
                data = f.read()
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            print(f"Connection error for user {user_id}, retrying...")
            time.sleep(5)
            self.stream_video(video_id, user_id, start_time, resolution)
            return

        # Handle pausing, restarting, and skipping
        while True:
            self.session_queue.put((video_id, user_id, start_time, resolution))
            self.session_queue.get()
            start_time += 10
            if start_time >= video_metadata.duration:
                break
            f.seek(int(start_time * video_metadata.file_size / video_metadata.duration))
            data = f.read()

        print(f"Finished streaming video {video_id} for user {user_id}")

# Example usage
video_streaming_service = VideoStreamingService('video_files')
video_streaming_service.add_video('video1', 'Example Video 1', 120, '720p', 100_000_000)
video_streaming_service.add_video('video2', 'Example Video 2', 180, '1080p', 200_000_000)

video_streaming_service.start_streaming('video1', 'user1', 30, '720p')
video_streaming_service.start_streaming('video2', 'user2', 0, '1080p')

import os
import io
import time
import threading
import random
import ffmpeg

from flask import Flask, request, send_file, jsonify
from flask_caching import Cache

app = Flask(__name__)
cache = Cache(app, config={'CACHE_TYPE': 'simple'})

VIDEO_DIR = 'videos/'

@app.route('/video/<video_id>', methods=['GET'])
def stream_video(video_id):
    video_path = os.path.join(VIDEO_DIR, video_id)
    if not os.path.exists(video_path):
        return jsonify({'error': 'Video not found'}), 404

    range_header = request.headers.get('Range', None)
    if range_header:
        start, end = range_header.replace('bytes=', '').split('-')
        start = int(start) if start else 0
        end = int(end) if end else os.path.getsize(video_path) - 1
    else:
        start = 0
        end = os.path.getsize(video_path) - 1

    chunk_size = 1024 * 1024  # 1 MB
    with open(video_path, 'rb') as f:
        f.seek(start)
        data = f.read(end - start + 1)

    response = send_file(
        io.BytesIO(data),
        mimetype='video/mp4',
        as_attachment=False,
        conditional=True,
        headers={
            'Content-Range': f'bytes {start}-{end}/{os.path.getsize(video_path)}',
            'Accept-Ranges': 'bytes'
        }
    )
    return response

@app.route('/upload', methods=['POST'])

        output_file = os.path.join(VIDEO_STORAGE_DIR, f'{uuid.uuid4().hex}.mp4')

        quality_options = player.find_elements_by_class_name("quality-option")
        for option in quality_options:

                break

        # Set playback speed
        speed_options = player.find_elements_by_class_name("speed-option")
        for option in speed_options:
            if option.text == playback_speed:
                option.click()
                break

        # Seek to specific time
        player.send_keys(Keys.HOME)
        player.send_keys(Keys.ARROW_RIGHT * seek_time)

        # Play video
        player.send_keys(Keys.SPACE)

    def download_video(self, output_path):
        # Find video source URL
        source_url = self.driver.find_element_by_class_name("video-source").get_attribute("src")

        # Download video
        response = requests.get(source_url, stream=True)
        with open(output_path, "wb") as file:
            for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=1024):
                file.write(chunk)

    def close(self):
        self.driver.quit()

            self.is_playing = True
            self.update_seek_bar()

        if self.is_playing:
            self.video_player.send_signal(subprocess.signal.SIGSTOP)

            self.video_player.terminate()
            self.is_playing = False
            self.seek_bar.set(0)

    def seek_video(self, value):
        if self.is_playing:
            position = float(value) / 100
            self.video_player.stdin.write(b"seek " + str(position).encode() + b"\n")
            self.video_player.stdin.flush()

    def set_volume(self, value):
        if self.is_playing:
            volume = int(value)
            self.video_player.stdin.write(b"volume " + str(volume).encode() + b"\n")
            self.video_player.stdin.flush()

    def update_seek_bar(self):
        if self.is_playing:
            duration = self.video_player.poll()
            if duration is None:
                self.seek_bar.after(1000, self.update_seek_bar)
            else:
                self.seek_bar.set(100 * self.video_player.stdin.tell() / duration)
                self.seek_bar.after(1000, self.update_seek_bar)

class VideoPlayer:
    def __init__(self, video_path):
        self.video_path = video_path
        self.cap = cv2.VideoCapture(self.video_path)
        self.fps = self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS)
        self.width = int(self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_WIDTH))
        self.height = int(self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_HEIGHT))
        self.total_frames = int(self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT))
        self.current_frame = 0
        self.paused = False
        self.volume = 100
        self.speed = 1.0

    def play(self):
        while True:
            if not self.paused:
                ret, frame = self.cap.read()
                if not ret:
                    break
                frame = cv2.resize(frame, (self.width, self.height))
                cv2.imshow('Video Player', frame)
                cv2.waitKey(int(1000/self.fps*self.speed))
                self.current_frame += 1
            key = cv2.waitKey(1) & 0xFF
            if key == ord('p'):
                self.paused = not self.paused
            elif key == ord('r'):
                self.cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, 0)
                self.current_frame = 0
            elif key == ord('f'):
                self.cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, self.current_frame + 10)
                self.current_frame += 10
            elif key == ord('b'):
                self.cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, self.current_frame - 10)
                self.current_frame -= 10
            elif key == ord('q'):
                break
            elif key == ord('+'):
                self.speed = min(self.speed + 0.1, 2.0)
            elif key == ord('-'):
                self.speed = max(self.speed - 0.1, 0.1)

        self.cap.release()
        cv2.destroyAllWindows()

        self.time_label.grid(row=2, column=0, columnspan=4, padx=5, pady=5)

    def open_video(self, file_path):
        self.video_path = file_path
        self.cap = cv2.VideoCapture(self.video_path)
        self.total_duration = int(self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FRAME_COUNT) / self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS))

    def play_video(self):
        if self.video_path is not None:
            self.is_playing = True
            self.update_video()

    def pause_video(self):
        self.is_playing = False

    def stop_video(self):
        self.is_playing = False
        self.current_time = 0
        self.cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, 0)
        self.update_time_label()

    def restart_video(self):
        self.is_playing = True
        self.current_time = 0
        self.cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, 0)
        self.update_video()

    def seek_video(self, value):
        self.current_time = int(float(value) * self.total_duration / 100)
        self.cap.set(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES, self.current_time * self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS))
        self.update_time_label()

    def update_video(self):
        if self.is_playing and self.cap.isOpened():
            ret, frame = self.cap.read()
            if ret:
                img = cv2.cvtColor(frame, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
                img = cv2.resize(img, (640, 360))
                photo = tk.PhotoImage(width=640, height=360)
                self.video_canvas.create_image(0, 0, image=photo, anchor=tk.NW)
                self.video_canvas.image = photo
                photo.put(img.tolist())
                self.current_time = int(self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_POS_FRAMES) / self.cap.get(cv2.CAP_PROP_FPS))
                self.update_time_label()
                self.video_canvas.after(33, self.update_video)
            else:
                self.is_playing = False

    def update_time_label(self):
        minutes = self.current_time // 60
        seconds = self.current_time % 60
        total_minutes = self.total_duration // 60
        total_seconds = self.total_duration % 60
        self.time_label.config(text=f"{minutes:02d}:{seconds:02d} / {total_minutes:02d}:{total_seconds:02d}")

def pad(data, block_size):
    padding_length = block_size - len(data) % block_size
    return data + bytes([padding_length]) * padding_length

def decrypt_file(file_path, password):

import re

def clean_text(text):
    # Remove non-ASCII characters
    text = text.encode('ascii', 'ignore').decode('ascii')
    
    # Remove punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', '', text)
    
    # Convert to lowercase
    text = text.lower()
    
    return text

def analyze_text(text):
    # Count vowels
    vowels = 'aeiou'
    vowel_count = sum(text.count(v) for v in vowels)
    
    # Count words
    words = text.split()
    word_count = len(words)
    
    # Count unique words
    unique_words = set(words)
    unique_word_count = len(unique_words)
    
    # Calculate average word length
    avg_word_length = sum(len(w) for w in words) / word_count
    
    return {
        'vowel_count': vowel_count,
        'word_count': word_count,
        'unique_word_count': unique_word_count,
        'avg_word_length': avg_word_length
    }

    local_filename = "file.zip"
    
    with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as response, open(local_filename, 'wb') as out_file:
        shutil.copyfileobj(response, out_file)
    
    with zipfile.ZipFile(local_filename, 'r') as zip_ref:
        zip_ref.extractall()
    
    os.remove(local_filename)
    
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk('.'):
        for file in files:
            if file.endswith('.py'):
                with open(os.path.join(root, file), 'r') as f:
                    code = f.read()
                    code = re.sub(r'import os', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'import re', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'import urllib.request', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'import shutil', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'import datetime', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'import subprocess', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'import zipfile', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'def main\(\):', '', code)
                    code = re.sub(r'if __name__ == \'__main__\':', '', code)

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import re
import random
import time

def web_scraper(url):
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/58.0.3029.110 Safari/537.3'}
    response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html.parser')
    return soup

def extract_data(soup):
    data = []
    for element in soup.find_all('div', class_='item'):
        title = element.find('h3').text.strip()
        price = element.find('span', class_='price').text.strip()
        data.append((title, price))
    return data

def save_to_file(data, filename):
    with open(filename, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as csvfile:
        for item in data:
            csvfile.write(f"{item[0]},{item[1]}\n")

def main():
    url = 'https://www.example.com/products'
    soup = web_scraper(url)
    data = extract_data(soup)
    save_to_file(data, 'product_data.csv')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
